productDisplayName: ADIDAS Kids-Unisex Tip Off 2 K White Sports Shoes
description: Whether you choose these adidas hightops for their excellent performance on the court or because of their great Sports look which will add style to any casual outfit, you will not be disappointed. adidas know the importance of balancing highly engineered features which improve sports performance with great fashion sense to ensure your feet are the stars whether you're playing or watching the game. Upper Leather upper for maximum flexibility and lightweight comfort Adidas patented 3-Stripe overlays on the side Hightops for snug support to the ankle Synthetic panel at the back heel for enhanced backfoot protection and support Perforations on the forefoot and midfoot for ventilation Meshed and plushly padded tongue for absolute breathability and snug comfort Breathable textile inner Lace-up system for a snug, customized Fit Midsole PU midsole for absolute lightweight comfort and impact protection Padded Ortholite footbed for all day cushioned comfort Outsole Durable non-marking rubber outsole with patterned lugs and suction points on the forefoot and heel for absolute grip and traction Torsion system in the midfoot to support the inner arch and improve forefoot motion control in both linear and lateral movement shoe care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
